title: Task: Review the current x-auto skill sprawl and identify the minimum safe implementation to unify SSOT and adapters for Claude/Codex. Inspect local repo only. Focus on correctness, drift risks, and test strategy. Do not edit files. Findings first, then recommended patch set.
summary_text: 1. **[Critical] `x-auto` skill execution is effectively single-lane (`claude`) and not tied to repo-owned skills.** Evidence: [`scripts/eval/defs/x-auto.yaml:1-2`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/defs/x-auto.yaml) hard-codes `~/.claude/skills/x-auto/...` and legacy `skill_name: x-auto`, while repo-owned skills are only [`skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md) and [`skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md). Impact: Codex/Claude adapter parity is broken by design; this is a direct “single-lane fallback” violation for x-auto. 2. **[High] Repo `x-auto` skills are outside the shared skill SSOT/sync contract.** Evidence: [`docs/agents/shared-skills.md:23`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/shared-skills.md) requires Codex/Claude skill sync from one manifest, but manifests contain no `x-auto` entries: [`config/skills/fugue-openclaw-baseline.tsv`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/skills/fugue-openclaw-baseline.tsv), [`config/skills/googleworkspace-cli-baseline.tsv`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/skills/googleworkspace-cli-baseline.tsv). Impact: `x-auto` can drift independently per provider with no guardrail. 3. **[High] `x-auto` policy authority is externalized to absolute machine paths, so repo-only correctness is not auditable.** Evidence: [`skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md:21-23`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md) sets authority to `/Users/.../Dev/x-auto/...`. Impact: local repo CI cannot prove correctness; behavior depends on out-of-repo state. 4. **[Medium] SSOT fragmentation between note-linking rule and post-guard rule creates scope ambiguity.** Evidence: note-link SSOT says URL must be in main body and no separate reply URL assumed by default: [`docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md:14-18`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md). Post-guard says quote URL must not be in body and should be reply-posted: [`skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md:51-56`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md). Impact: easy operator/model misapplication unless scope boundary is explicit in one SSOT. 5. **[Medium] Adapter unification is blocked by contract drift: “thin adapters” is declared, but CODEX adapter is enforced as a policy monolith.** Evidence: thin-adapter rule in [`docs/agents/adapter-contract.md:6-9`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/adapter-contract.md) and README claim in [`README.md:77-79`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/README.md), while [`scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh:193-260`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh) hard-requires many literal policy strings in [`CODEX.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/CODEX.md). Impact: SSOT consolidation cannot proceed safely without changing gates. 6. **[Medium] Test coverage misses actual `x-auto` adapter/skill drift.** Evidence: workflow checks only note-linking doc+ADR+single test paths: [`x-auto-note-linking-rule.yml:6-9`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/x-auto-note-linking-rule.yml). No test covers `skills/x-auto-*` or `scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py`. Eval CI is dry-run only: [`eval-ci.yml:59-70`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/eval-ci.yml). Runtime proof: `bash scripts/eval/skill-eval.sh --skill x-auto-post-guard` fails (definition missing), while only legacy `x-auto` def exists. **Recommended minimum safe patch set (no redesign, SSOT + adapter parity only)** 1. Add a single repo SSOT for x-auto behavior, e.g. `docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md`, with explicit scope matrix: `lead-post(note link)` vs `quote-p...
